title: narcissus bujei
intro: Narcissus bujei, also known as the Chinese golden narcissus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Narcissus bujei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Narcissus bujei is often used in tea or decoction form, and it can also be dried and used as a powder or extract for various health benefits.
